reviews.comment:
Es muy bueno saber que podes inflar los neumáticos y que no necesitas monedas para hacerlo ya que es gratuito

(Translated by Google)
It's great to know you can inflate your tires and you don't need coins to do it because it's free.

reviews.comment:
Solía ser un buen punto de reunión y servicios, pero hace mucho que está en obra y no está bueno. Esperemos que terminen.

(Translated by Google)
It used to be a great meeting place and a good spot for services, but it's been under construction for a long time and it's not nice. Let's hope they finish it soon.
